metadata.name: Process a Ticket Refund for a Canceled Event

description: An event has been canceled, and a ticket holder is requesting a full refund.

nodes.task_description: Look up the customer's order using their order number or email address.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully finds the original ticket purchase.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the event was officially canceled and that the ticket is eligible for a refund.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the event cancellation and ticket eligibility.

nodes.task_description: Process a full refund to the original payment method.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully initiates the refund transaction.

nodes.task_description: Send a confirmation email to the customer showing the refund has been processed.
